chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) The port authority may collect a fee for permits issued under this subchapter. The fees may not exceed $80 per trip.

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.283 — Permit Fees

(a) The port authority may collect a fee for permits issued under this subchapter. The fees may not exceed $80 per trip.

(b) Fees collected under Subsection (a) shall be used solely for the construction and maintenance of port authority roadways.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 812 (S.B.1571), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2009.*
